name: Blueberry Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Prepare an 8-inch square pan with cooking spray and flour.
To prepare the crust, combine 1 cup flour, margarine, and powdered sugar in a mixing bowl.
Spread over the bottom of the prepared pan. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
Meanwhile, to prepare the filling, combine egg whites, lemon juice, and vanilla in a small mixing bowl.
In a larger mixing bowl, combine sugar, remaining flour, blueberries, coconut, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
Spread over the top of the baked layer. Bake for another 30 minutes.
Cut into 2-inch bars when cooled.
